incorrects.description: Student clicked wrong scale button on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Look for the Scale of 2 button and click it.

incorrects.description: Student clicked wrong scale button on second attempt

steps.text: Here's what to try: click the button that says 'Scale of 2'. It's part of the scale selector.

incorrects.description: Student clicked wrong scale button three or more times. System models the correct action.

params.description: System demonstrates: Scale transitions to 2. All bars land exactly on tick marks. Green checkmark indicator appears.

steps.text: Let me show you. I click the Scale of 2 button. The scale changes and now all the bars land exactly on tick marks. With Scale of 2, half of 2 is 1, so every whole number lands right on a line or exactly halfway between two lines.
